page.t: %1(ship name) \(%2\)(ship ID code) sold %3(amount) of %4(ammo name) for %5(price) Cr.
%1(ship name) \(%2\)(ship ID code) sold %3(amount) of %4(ware name) for %5(price) Cr.
%s(ship name) \(%2\)(ship ID code)\nSold %3(amount) of %4(ammo name) for %5(price) Cr.
%s(ship name) \(%2\)(ship ID code)\nSold %3(amount) of %4(ware name) for %5(price) Cr.
